544 ANTCGLNT_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD ANTCGLNT_INDCTN_DSCHRG_CD High-Risk Drug (Indication): Anticoagulant (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was taking medication from the anticoagulant class and whether there was an indication
